title: D2: README rewrite (8 真特色 + 4 deliberately-not-done + MCP-vs-CLI + vs-Tencent-article)
description: Rewrite README 'Why Fabric' section per scope.md §2.D2. Sections: (1) Pain point opening (cross-client knowledge sustainment). (2) 8 真特色 enumeration: cross-client MCP-first / harness-agnostic / two-stage cold-start / async-review primitive / path-decoupled stable_id + layer-flip audit / cross-client hook reminder layer / doctor unified lifecycle engine / filesystem-edit fallback. (3) 4 deliberately not done: 5-layer storage (we do 2) / independent team-knowledge.git repo (v2.1) / 16-stage workflow injection (we're harness-agnostic) / remote control (IDE infra problem). (4) MCP vs CLI adapter clarification: planContext() is the engine, MCP and CLI are adapters for different callers (Agent vs hook scripts) — not redundancy. (5) Position vs the Tencent article: shared genes (5 types, 3 maturity, lint discipline), distinct architecture (harness-agnostic, MCP-first, in-repo + personal dual root). Update supported-clients list to 3 (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex CLI).

files.target: Why Fabric section + supported clients list + Architecture overview
files.change: Rewrite per 5-section structure; update client list; remove stale dashboard/L0/L1/L2 references

implementation: Read current README.md to identify stale references (6-client list, dashboard mentions, L0/L1/L2 protocol references)
Draft new 'Pain point opening' paragraph: cross-client knowledge sustainment problem
Draft '8 真特色' section with one paragraph per feature (cite each from completed rc.5 items)
Draft '4 deliberately not done' section explaining each rejection with one-line rationale
Draft 'MCP vs CLI adapter' explainer (cite planContext() as shared engine)
Update supported-clients list to Claude Code / Cursor / Codex CLI only
Remove dashboard install instructions (now deleted in TASK-002)
Cross-check that all 8 真特色 link to specific rc.5 implementation (file references in scope.md §1)

reference.pattern: Major README rewrite preserving install/usage commands
reference.examples: Mirror Tencent article's narrative structure for positioning section

criteria: README rewritten with 8 真特色 enumeration + 4 deliberately-not-done + MCP-vs-CLI adapter clarification + vs-Tencent-article position
Supported clients list reduced to 3 (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI)
No references to dashboard, L0/L1/L2 protocol, 6-client list
Each 真特色 cites specific implementation evidence

rationale.chosen_approach: Full rewrite of Why Fabric section; preserve technical install/usage docs; D2 is last because it references all completed rc.5 items
alternatives_considered: Move to separate WHY.md and keep README minimal
decision_factors: All 8 真特色 only stable after rc.5 implementation lands
rationale.tradeoffs: Large diff in single commit; mitigated by section-level review

manual_checks: Open rendered README on GitHub preview; verify section structure
Cross-reference each 真特色 with source file evidence

risks.description: Future rc.6 changes invalidate README claims
risks.mitigation: rc.6 adds active-injection layer — supplement README again in TASK-024 if needed
risks.fallback: Patch README in rc.6 coverage gate task
